title: MIR construction in SSA form with CFG and optimization passes
description: Implement pkg/mir/mir.go: MIR types (MIRFunction, BasicBlock, BlockID, MIRStmt interface variants for Assign/Call/BinaryOp/UnaryOp/FieldAccess/IndexAccess/ArrayAlloc/StructAlloc/EnumAlloc/ClosureAlloc/ChannelCreate/ChannelSend/Spawn, Terminator interface variants for Goto/Branch/Switch/Return/Unreachable, MIRLocal/MIRConst/MIRGlobal values). Implement pkg/mir/builder.go: HIR-to-MIR SSA construction with phi node placement at join points. Implement pkg/mir/printer.go: MIR pretty-printer. Write mir_test.go for SSA correctness, CFG structure, phi node placement. Then implement all 11 optimization passes in pkg/optimize/: pipeline.go (pass runner), constant_fold.go, dead_code.go, copy_prop.go, cse.go, inline.go (≤8 stmts, not recursive), const_prop.go, licm.go, tco.go (self-tail-recursion to loop), escape.go (stack vs heap decision), block_merge.go. Write optimize_test.go verifying each pass individually and the combined pipeline preserves semantics. Create golden test data in tests/testdata/optimize/.
